home.heroSub: We build stunning, fast, bilingual websites for Puerto Rico restaurants — then hand you the keys. No guesswork, no deposits, no delays.
home.howHeading: We build it. You see it. You own it.
home.step1Body: We research your restaurant, pull your menu, photos, and brand — and build a complete website. No deposit required.
home.step2Body: Get a live link to your fully built site. No imagination needed — it's already done and ready to launch.
home.step3Body: Love it? Click to pay and your site goes live. We handle hosting, security, and ongoing support.
home.packagesSub: No surprise fees. Cancel any time.
home.whyHeading: Built for Puerto Rico restaurants. By people who know PR.
home.why1Body: We know Puerto Rico — the culture, the market, and what resonates with local guests and tourists alike.
home.why2Body: We don't do everything. We do one thing exceptionally well: restaurant websites in Puerto Rico.
home.why3Body: Every site speaks to your Spanish and English-speaking guests natively — not translated, written.
home.why4Body: You see a finished product before you spend a cent. That's a first in this market.
home.ctaHeading: Ready to see your restaurant online?
home.ctaBody: We'll build your free preview — no strings attached. If you love it, it's yours.

services.heroSub: Pick the plan that fits your restaurant. Every package includes a professionally built Next.js website on fast Vercel hosting.

portfolio.heroSub: Every site is built custom — same attention to detail, unique to each restaurant.

howItWorks.heroHeading: From idea to live site — you're in control.
howItWorks.heroSub: We flipped the traditional web agency model on its head. You never have to imagine what your site will look like.

localSeo.heroHeading: Get found on Google. Fill more tables.
localSeo.heroSub: Most Puerto Rico restaurants are invisible on Google. We fix that.

about.heroHeading: Built in Puerto Rico, for Puerto Rico.
about.heroSub: Sabor Web is a restaurant-only web agency. We build websites for PR restaurants — and we live here too.

contact.heroSub: Tell us your restaurant and we'll build a free preview site. No commitment, no credit card.
contact.success: Got it! We'll build your preview and be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or WhatsApp us directly.
